title: Sweet American Vanilla Grilled Cake
description: A delicious and crispy grilled cake infused with the sweetness of vanilla, perfect for a cozy dessert or snack.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, ensuring the grates are clean and brushed with cooking spray.
In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together butter, eggs, and vanilla extract.
Add the soda water to the wet ingredients and whisk until combined.
Gradually pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and mix until just combined.
Transfer the batter to a piping bag fitted with a round tip.
Pipe the batter onto the prepared grill in 4-6 equal portions.
Grill for 3-4 minutes or until golden brown, flipping halfway through.
Serve warm, dust with powdered sugar if desired.
